content: Using the account.report engine (get_options then get_report_information), the low figure is a period/scope issue - the date range and posted-vs-draft filter, not bad data. Nothing was edited.

arguments.code:
pb = call('odoo', {'operation':'playbook','name':'report-numbers-wrong'})
opts = call('odoo', {'model':'account.report','method':'get_options','args':[[]]})
info = call('odoo', {'model':'account.report','method':'get_report_information','args':[[], opts]})
